title: correa × rubra var. glabra
intro: Correa × rubra var. glabra is a plant species that is a variant of the Correa × rubra, a hybrid of Correa alba and Correa pulchella, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Correa × rubra var. glabra include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in some parts of the world. Herbal preparations of Correa × rubra var. glabra can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
